1_api_status.details: Returns full agent roster (28+ agents) with metadata, status, progress, tasks. Response is valid JSON.
1_api_status.response_sample: agents array with sysmon, ceo, orchestrator, apipatcher, etc.

2_api_pay_stripe.details: Returns live Stripe checkout URL. Tested with {tier: 'solo', amount_cents: 4900}. Session ID returned, checkout_url points to checkout.stripe.com. LIVE mode confirmed.
2_api_pay_stripe.note: Endpoint returns 400 if wrong field names used (e.g. 'plan' instead of 'tier'). Correct required fields: tier, amount_cents.

3_landing_page.details: File does NOT exist. The public/ directory contains: buy.html, buy-agent-kit.html, buy-us-market.html, buy/agent-kit/index.html. No index.html landing page found anywhere in public/.
3_landing_page.recommendation: BLOCKER — Must create public/index.html or designate one of the existing landing pages as the canonical entry point.

4_white_paper.details: File does NOT exist. No file in reports/ contains 'whitepaper' in its name. Closest match is reports/autonomousops_blueprint.html which is a technical blueprint, not a white paper.
4_white_paper.recommendation: BLOCKER — White paper has not been created. The blueprint is a code-heavy technical doc, not the professional white paper specified in the product launch requirements.

blockers: public/index.html — Landing page missing. No canonical entry point for visitors.
reports/autonomousops_whitepaper.html — White paper missing entirely. Blueprint exists but is not a white paper.
what_works: /api/status — Fully operational, returns complete agent fleet data
/api/pay — Stripe checkout LIVE, generating real checkout sessions with correct pricing
actions_required: Create or copy a landing page to public/index.html
Create the white paper at reports/autonomousops_whitepaper.html (professional, not code-heavy)
